    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractScmAccessor
    Base class for components that want to access a source control management system.
    AbstractScmAccessorProperties
     
    AbstractScmEnvironmentRepository
     
    AbstractVaultEnvironmentRepository
     
    Application
     
    AppRoleClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    AwsCodeCommitCredentialProvider
    Provides a jgit CredentialsProvider implementation that can provide the appropriate credentials to connect to an AWS CodeCommit repository.
    AwsEc2ClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    AwsIamClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    AwsParameterStoreEnvironmentProperties
     
    AwsParameterStoreEnvironmentRepository
     
    AwsParameterStoreEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    AwsS3EnvironmentProperties
     
    AwsS3EnvironmentRepository
     
    AwsS3EnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    AwsSecretsManagerEnvironmentProperties
     
    AwsSecretsManagerEnvironmentRepository
     
    AwsSecretsManagerEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    AzureMsiClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    BasePropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    BitbucketPropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    CertificateClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    CipherEnvironmentEncryptor
    EnvironmentEncryptor that can decrypt property values prefixed with {cipher} marker.
    CipherResourceJsonEncryptor
    ResourceEncryptor implementation that can decrypt property values prefixed with {cipher} marker in a JSON file.
    CipherResourcePropertiesEncryptor
    ResourceEncryptor implementation that can decrypt property values prefixed with {cipher} marker in a Properties file.
    CipherResourceYamlEncryptor
    ResourceEncryptor implementation that can decrypt property values prefixed with {cipher} marker in a YAML file.
    CompositeConfiguration
     
    CompositeEnvironmentBeanFactoryInitializationAotProcessor
    A BeanFactoryInitializationAotProcessor implementation that generates code for registering composite environment repository beans.
    CompositeEnvironmentBeanFactoryPostProcessor
    A BeanFactoryPostProcessor to register EnvironmentRepository BeanDefinitions based on the composite list configuration.
    CompositeEnvironmentRepository
    An EnvironmentRepository composed of multiple ordered EnvironmentRepositorys.
    CompositePropertyPathNotificationExtractor
    A PropertyPathNotificationExtractor that cycles through a set of (ordered) delegates, looking for the first non-null outcome.
    CompositeUtils
     
    ConditionalOnMissingSearchPathLocator
     
    ConditionalOnSearchPathLocator
     
    ConfigClientAutoConfiguration
    Expose a ConfigClientProperties just so that there is a way to inspect the properties bound to it.
    ConfigClientAutoConfiguration.ConfigClientWatchConfiguration
     
    ConfigClientAutoConfiguration.ConfigServerHealthIndicatorConfiguration
     
    ConfigClientFailFastException
     
    ConfigClientHealthProperties
     
    ConfigClientProperties
     
    ConfigClientProperties.Credentials
    Credentials properties.
    ConfigClientProperties.Discovery
    Discovery properties.
    ConfigClientProperties.MultipleUriStrategy
    Enumerates possible strategies to use when multiple URLs are provided and an error occurs.
    ConfigClientRequestTemplateFactory
     
    ConfigClientRequestTemplateFactory.GenericRequestHeaderInterceptor
    Adds the provided headers to the request.
    ConfigClientRetryBootstrapper
    Bootstrapper.
    ConfigClientStateHolder
     
    ConfigClientWatch
     
    ConfigServerAutoConfiguration
     
    ConfigServerBootstrapApplicationListener
    Normally you don't want the config server to be a config client itself, so this listener disables the config client unless spring.cloud.config.enabled is explicitly "true".
    ConfigServerBootstrapConfiguration
    Bootstrap configuration to fetch external configuration from a (possibly remote) EnvironmentRepository.
    ConfigServerBootstrapConfiguration.LocalPropertySourceLocatorConfiguration
     
    ConfigServerBootstrapOverridesAutoConfiguration

    DefaultTextEncryptionAutoConfiguration
    Default text encryption auto-configuration.
    DiscoveryClientConfigServiceBootstrapConfiguration
    Bootstrap configuration for a config client that wants to lookup the config server via discovery.
    EnableConfigServer
     
    EncryptionAutoConfiguration
    Autoconfiguration for text encryptors and environment encryptors (non-web stuff).
    EncryptionController
     
    Environment
    Simple plain text serializable encapsulation of a list of property sources.
    EnvironmentCleaner
     
    EnvironmentConfigTokenProvider
     
    EnvironmentController
     
    EnvironmentEncryptor
    Service interface for decrypting properties in Environment object.
    EnvironmentEncryptorEnvironmentRepository
    A delegating EnvironmentRepository that can decrypt the properties if an EnvironmentEncryptor is provided.
    EnvironmentException
     
    EnvironmentMediaType
    Media types that can be consumed and produced by Environment endpoints.

    EnvironmentRepositoryProperties
     
    EnvironmentRepositoryPropertySourceLocator
    A PropertySourceLocator that reads from an EnvironmentRepository.
    EnvironmentWatch
     
    EnvironmentWatch.Default
    Default implementation of the EnvironmentWatch.
    FailedToConstructEnvironmentException
     
    FileBasedSshSessionFactory
     
    FileBasedSshTransportConfigCallback
    Configure JGit transport command to use a default SSH session factory based on local machines SSH config.
    FileMonitorConfiguration
    Configuration for a file watcher that detects changes in local files related to the environment repository.
    GcpGceClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    GcpIamClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    GcpProjectResolutionSupport
    Resolves which Google Cloud project to use for GSM.
    GenericResourceRepository
    An ResourceRepository backed by a SearchPathLocator.
    GitCredentialsProviderFactory
    A CredentialsProvider factory for Git repositories.
    GiteaPropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    GiteePropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    GithubPropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    GitlabPropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    GitSkipSslValidationCredentialsProvider
    A CredentialsProvider that will ignore any SSL validation errors that occur.
    GitUriFailureAnalyzer
     
    GogsPropertyPathNotificationExtractor
     
    GoogleCloudSourceConfiguration
    Adds Google Cloud Source OAuth2 support, if com.google.auth:google-auth-library-oauth2-http library is on classpath.
    GoogleCloudSourceSupport
    Provides credentials for Google Cloud Source repositories by adding a Authenticate http header.
    GoogleConfigProvider
     
    GoogleSecretComparatorByVersion
     
    GoogleSecretManagerAccessStrategy
     
    GoogleSecretManagerAccessStrategyFactory
     
    GoogleSecretManagerEnvironmentProperties
     
    GoogleSecretManagerEnvironmentRepository
     
    GoogleSecretManagerEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    GoogleSecretManagerV1AccessStrategy
     
    HostKeyAlgoSupported
    Beans annotated with HostKeyAlgoSupported and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    HostKeyAlgoSupportedValidator
    JSR-303 Cross Field validator that ensures that a MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties bean for the constraints: - If host key algo is supported Beans annotated with HostKeyAlgoSupported and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    HostKeyAndAlgoBothExist
    Beans annotated with HostKeyAndAlgoBothExist and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    HostKeyAndAlgoBothExistValidator
    JSR-303 Cross Field validator that ensures that a MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties bean for the constraints: - If host key is set then host key algo must also be set - If host key algo is set then host key must also be set Beans annotated with HostKeyAndAlgoBothExist and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    HttpClient4BuilderCustomizer
     
    HttpClient4Support
     
    HttpClientConfigurableHttpConnectionFactory
     
    HttpClientSupport
     
    HttpEnvironmentRepositoryProperties
     
    HttpHeaderGoogleConfigProvider
     
    HttpRequestConfigTokenProvider
     
    InvalidApplicationNameException
    A InvalidApplicationNameException is thrown when config client detects an invalid application name.
    InvalidApplicationNameExceptionFailureAnalyzer
    An AbstractFailureAnalyzer that analyzes InvalidApplicationNameException.
    InvalidEnvironmentRequestException
     
    JdbcEnvironmentProperties
     
    JdbcEnvironmentRepository
    An EnvironmentRepository that picks up data from a relational database.
    JdbcEnvironmentRepository.PropertiesResultSetExtractor
     
    JdbcEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    JGitEnvironmentProperties
     
    JGitEnvironmentRepository
    An EnvironmentRepository backed by a single git repository.
    JGitEnvironmentRepository.JGitFactory
    Wraps the static method calls to Git and CloneCommand allowing for easier unit testing.
    KeyStoreTextEncryptorLocator
    A TextEncryptorLocator that pulls RSA key pairs out of a keystore.
    KnownHostsFileIsValid
    Beans annotated with KnownHostsFileIsValid and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    KnownHostsFileValidator
    JSR-303 Cross Field validator that ensures that a MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties bean for the constraints: - Verifies that known hosts file exists
    KubernetesClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    LocatorTextEncryptor
     
    MongoDbEnvironmentProperties
    Properties related to MongoDB environment repository.
    MongoDbEnvironmentRepository
     
    MongoDbEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
    Factory for creating instances of MongoDbEnvironmentRepository.
    MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties
     
    MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties.PatternMatchingJGitEnvironmentProperties
    A JGitEnvironmentProperties that matches patterns.
    MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepository
    EnvironmentRepository that based on one or more git repositories.
    MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepository.PatternMatchingJGitEnvironmentRepository
    A JGitEnvironmentProperties that matches patterns.
    MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    NativeEnvironmentProperties
     
    NativeEnvironmentRepository
    Simple implementation of EnvironmentRepository that uses a SpringApplication and configuration files located through the normal protocols.
    NativeEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    NoSuchLabelException
     
    NoSuchRepositoryException
     
    NoSuchResourceException
     
    ObservationEnvironmentRepositoryContext
    Observation.Context for Spring Cloud Config.
    ObservationEnvironmentRepositoryWrapper
    Wraps a EnvironmentRepository execution with observation.
    OnSearchPathLocatorPresent
     
    PassphraseCredentialsProvider
    A CredentialsProvider that uses a passphrase.
    PassthruEnvironmentRepository
    Simple implementation of EnvironmentRepository that just reflects an existing Spring Environment.
    PassthruSecretLocator
     
    PathUtils
     
    PcfClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    PrivateKeyIsValid
    Beans annotated with PrivateKeyValidator and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    PrivateKeyValidator
    JSR-303 Cross Field validator that ensures that an MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties bean for the constraints: - Private key is present and can be correctly parsed using KeyPair Beans annotated with PrivateKeyValidator and Validated will have the constraints applied.
    PropertiesBasedSshTransportConfigCallback
    Configure JGit transport command to use a SSH session factory that is configured using properties defined in MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties.
    PropertyBasedSshSessionFactory
    In a cloud environment local SSH config files such as `.known_hosts` may not be suitable for providing configuration settings due to ephemeral filesystems.
    PropertyPathEndpoint
    HTTP endpoint for webhooks coming from repository providers.
    PropertyPathNotification
    Simple abstraction of a list of paths that changed in a repository.
    PropertyPathNotificationExtractor
    Strategy for extracting a PropertyPathNotification from an incoming, unstructured request.
    PropertySource
    Simple plain text serializable encapsulation of a named source of key-value pairs.
    PropertyValueDescriptor
    A description of a property's value, including its origin if available.
    ProxyHostCredentialsProvider
     
    ProxyHostProperties
    Properties for a proxy host.
    ProxyHostProperties.ProxyForScheme
    Proxy for a given scheme.
    RedisEnvironmentProperties
     
    RedisEnvironmentRepository
     
    RedisEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    RepositoryException
     
    ResourceController
    An HTTP endpoint for serving up templated plain text resources from an underlying repository.
    ResourceControllerAdvice
     
    ResourceEncryptor
    Interface for decrypting values in plain text files served through ResourceController.
    ResourceEncryptorConfiguration
    Adds configuration to decrypt plain text files served through ResourceController.
    ResourceRepository
     
    ResourceRepositoryConfiguration
     
    RetryProperties
     
    RetryTemplateFactory
     
    RsaEncryptionAutoConfiguration
    Autoconfiguration for RSA encryption.
    SchemeBasedRoutePlanner
     
    SearchPathCompositeEnvironmentRepository
    A CompositeEnvironmentRepository which implements SearchPathLocator.
    SearchPathLocator
    Strategy for locating a search path for resource (e.g. in the file system or classpath).
    SearchPathLocator.Locations
    Locations POJO.
    SecretLocator
     
    SingleTextEncryptorLocator
     
    SpringVaultClientAuthenticationProvider
     
    SpringVaultClientConfiguration
    This class is adapted from EnvironmentVaultConfiguration and org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.ClientAuthenticationFactory in order to provide configuration consistent with Spring Cloud Vault's property-based configuration.
    SpringVaultEnvironmentRepository
     
    SpringVaultEnvironmentRepositoryFactory
     
    SpringVaultTemplateBuilder
     
    SshPropertyValidator
    Validate SSH related properties.
    SshUriPropertyProcessor
    Check if Git repo properties refer to an SSH based transport then filter and extract the properties.

    SvnKitEnvironmentProperties

    Subversion-backed EnvironmentRepository.

    Auto configuration for vault encryptor.

    VaultEnvironmentEncryptor that can decrypt property values prefixed with {vault} marker.

    AppRole properties.
    VaultEnvironmentProperties.AuthenticationMethod

    AWS-IAM properties.
    VaultEnvironmentProperties.AzureMsiProperties

    GCP credential properties.

    VaultEnvironmentProperties.GcpIamProperties
    GCP-IAM properties.
    VaultEnvironmentProperties.KubernetesProperties
    Kubernetes properties.
    VaultEnvironmentProperties.PcfProperties
    PCF properties.
    VaultEnvironmentProperties.Ssl
    SSL properties.
    VaultKvAccessStrategy
    Strategy interface to obtain secrets from Vault's key-value secret backend.

    Vault response POJO.
